---
title: "Untitled"
author: ECP Class
format: pdf
execute: 
  echo: false
figures:
    fig-two-caption: This is figure two caption
    fig-three-caption: This is another caption
---

This is a text

```{r}
#| echo: true
x <- "Only show the values"
print(x)
```

Figure label in metadata need to start with `fig-*` Table label in metadata need to start with `tbl-*`

```{r}
#| label: fig-pk 
#| fig-cap: Concentration Time profile 
#| fig-cap-location: top
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(Theoph, aes(Time, conc, group=Subject)) + 
    geom_line()
```

This is @fig-pk

DIV syntax

::: {#fig-pk-two}
```{r}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(Theoph, aes(Time, conc, group=Subject)) + 
    geom_line()
```

{{< meta figures.fig-two-caption >}}
:::

referring to @fig-pk-two
